case_title: WORLDWIDE ASSET PURCHASING, II, LLC VS. JESSE D WOODBURRY et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-18-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-13-2009 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WORLDWIDE ASSET PURCHASING, II, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WOODBURRY, JESSE D DOES 1-5 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-27-2009

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-18-2009 CONTINUED TO MAY-13-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. THE MAR-18-2009 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAY-13-2009 AT 1:30PM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: NICI RODICH CSR# 11604 (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
